text: Subcontractor  will  maintain  a  "record"  set  of  contract  drawings,  specifications  and  its  shop drawings at the site for inspection by Contractor.  Subcontractor shall redline mark its office set of documents  and  keep  all  information  current.  Subcontractor  shall  incorporate  RFI  responses, clarifications, Contractor revisions and modifications to the Subcontract into the 'as-built' set of documents.  The documents will be updated on a weekly basis and shall reflect actual installations. If the 'as-built' documents are not kept updated, this will be grounds to withhold payment and delay processing of the monthly progress billing. All cost associated with any updating shall be the  responsibility of the Subcontractor. Upon completion of the Work, Subcontractor will transfer all  drawing  notes  on  to  a  reproducible  and  deliver  to  Contractor  one  set  of  these  Drawings, Specifications and Shop Drawings, as well as any as-builts required by specifications.
